description:
**Job Description Summary**
 An exciting opportunity for a Senior Manager, Commercial Effectiveness to be based in Riyadh, KSA. The role will support go to market (GTM) model and report to the Country General Manager (CGM)
   

  

**Job Description**
**We are the makers of possible**
 BD is one of the largest global medical technology companies in the world. Advancing the world of health™ is our Purpose, and it’s no small feat. It takes the imagination and passion of all of us—from design and engineering to the manufacturing and marketing of our billions of MedTech products per year—to look at the impossible and find transformative solutions that turn dreams into possibilities.
   

  

**Why join us?**
 A career at BD means learning and working alongside inspirational leaders and colleagues who are equally passionate and committed to fostering an inclusive, growth\-centered, and rewarding culture. You will have the opportunity to help shape the trajectory of BD while leaving a legacy at the same time.
   

  

 To find purpose in the possibilities, we need people who can see the bigger picture, who understand the human story that underpins everything we do. We welcome people with the imagination and drive to help us reinvent the future of health. At BD, you’ll discover a culture in which you can learn, grow and thrive. And find satisfaction in doing your part to make the world a better place.
   

  

 Become a
 **maker of possible** 
 with us!
   

  

**About The Role**
 The
 **Senior Manager, Commercial Effectiveness** 
 is accountable for driving sales effectiveness, execution discipline, return on investment (ROI), and sustainable revenue growth across the KSA business. The role will lead the transformation of the commercial model by embedding best in class sales processes, systems, tools, and capability frameworks that optimize go to market (GTM) execution and Sales Force Effectiveness.
   

  

 As a Senior Manager, the role partners closely with Sales Leadership, Finance, Marketing, Operations, and the Executive Leadership Team to elevate commercial productivity, governance, leadership maturity, and customer engagement. The role reports to the Saudi GM and plays a key role in shaping and delivering the largest commercial transformation program in Saudi Arabia.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities Will Include**
**Commercial Effectiveness \& Growth**
* Lead Commercial Effectiveness across the KSA business to improve ROI, accelerate growth, and enhance sales productivity.
* Translate commercial and growth strategy into structured, scalable execution frameworks across channels and customer segments.
* Outline and drive the business case for transformation, influencing executive leadership to modernize the commercial model and ways of working.
* Co create and deliver the end\-to\-end GTM transformation program to support the transition to direct market engagement.


**Sales Performance \& Execution Excellence**
* Establish and monitor sales KPIs, targets, productivity metrics, and governance standards aligned with company and regional priorities.
* Drive value creation through disciplined pipeline management, conversion optimization, pricing Discipline and deal quality.
* Increase the value, success rate, and strategic impact of Must Win Deals through governance, prioritization, and structured coaching.
* Coach sales leaders and teams on opportunity strategy, value articulation, and deal execution.


**Sales Operations, Governance \& Salesforce Enablement**
* Own the end‑to‑end sales operating rhythm, including forecasting, pipeline reviews, performance reviews, and QBRs.
* Ensure strong governance, compliance, and data integrity across CRM (Salesforce.com), reporting, and incentive tracking.
* Define and embed standards for onboarding, adoption, and advanced use of Salesforce.com to drive execution and insight.
* Drive consistent and disciplined use of commercial processes, systems, and tools.


**GTM Design \& Coverage Optimization**
* Establish a consistent, data driven approach to:
* Account classification and segmentation
* Customer targeting and sizing
* Sales force sizing and deployment
* Sales territory design and optimization
* Implement an industry leading Product Model approach to improve clarity of ownership, accountability, and execution.
* Create scalable playbooks and commercial frameworks that provide a common language across the organization.


**Sales Enablement, Capability Building \& Change Management**
* Build and lead a high performing Sales Excellence team to create excellence in commercial processes, systems, and tools.
* Design and deliver sales enablement, onboarding, and training programs aligned to KSA market needs.
* Create a new, sustainable sales support and training structure for field and inside sales.
* Drive enterprise\-wide change management to embed standards, expectations, and performance discipline into individual and leadership goals.
* Foster a culture of accountability, customer centricity, continuous improvement, and execution excellence.


**Inside Sales \& Underserved Market Expansion**
* Lead and scale the Inside Sales channel to improve customer coverage and serve underserved segments.
* Create and implement a comprehensive Inside Sales Playbook covering:
* Operating model and customer experience
* Business case and location strategy
* Systems, tools, and enablement
* End‑to‑end sales excellence and performance tracking
* Increase customer engagement and penetration through differentiated channel strategies.


**Analytics \& Decision Support**
* Provide data driven insights into sales performance, market trends, customer behavior, and competitive dynamics.
* Deliver executive dashboards, insights, and recommendations to enable fast, informed decision making.
* Measure and continuously improve the ROI and effectiveness of commercial investments and initiatives.


**Leadership \& Stakeholder Management**
* Act as a trusted advisor to Senior Sales Leadership and the Executive Leadership Team.
* Engage network teams across the organization to localize strategies and ensure effective execution.
* Lead cross functional collaboration to ensure seamless commercialization and transformation delivery.
* Improve organizational engagement and leadership effectiveness through clarity and trust.


**About You**
* Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, finance, or related field (MBA or equivalent preferred).
* 12\+ years of experience in Sales Excellence, Commercial Effectiveness, Sales Operations, or Commercial Strategy.
* Proven senior leadership experience within KSA and in a healthcare environment.
* Strong expertise in Salesforce.com, sales analytics, forecasting, performance management, and GTM models.
* Demonstrated success leading large scale commercial transformation and change management.


**Key Competencies**
* Strategic thinking with strong execution focus
* Commercial and financial acumen
* Data driven decision making
* Executive presence, influencing, and stakeholder management
* Change leadership and transformation mindset
* Strong communication and coaching skills


 Click on apply if this sounds like you!
   

  

 At BD, we prioritize on\-site collaboration because we believe it fosters creativity, innovation, and effective problem\-solving, which are essential in the fast\-paced healthcare industry. For most roles, we require a minimum of 4 days of in\-office presence per week to maintain our culture of excellence and ensure smooth operations, while also recognizing the importance of flexibility and work\-life balance. Remote or field\-based positions will have different workplace arrangements which will be indicated in the job posting.

We evaluate applicants without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, creed, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, marital or domestic or civil union status, familial status, affectional or sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetics, disability, military eligibility or veteran status, and other legally\-protected characteristics.

 Marketing \& Brand

description:
🌀 The Company
   

  

 Filigran, founded in October 2022, stands out in the cybertech ecosystem for its commitment to revolutionizing cyber threat management with a proactive approach. Its mission is to develop innovative open\-source solutions designed to anticipate cyber threats, identify security gaps, and strengthen organizational security posture.
   

  

 Filigran solutions are now trusted by over 6,000 public and private organizations worldwide.
   

  

 🎯 The Role
   

  

 The Senior Customer Platform Architect will be responsible for supporting customers in the deployment of their on\-premise infrastructure hosting Filigran products, conducting regular health checks, and providing advisory support during the pre\-sales process regarding on\-premise infrastructure requirements.
   

  

 The role of the Customer Platform Architect is essential to ensure proper sizing of the infrastructure for new on\-premise customers, to adapt deployments to specific technological and security contexts, and to guarantee the reliability of this infrastructure in supporting our customers’ threat management operations.
   

  

 💼 Your Responsibilities
   

  

* Guide customers through the deployment of their platform: Assist customers in the design, implementation, and configuration of their platform based on their needs.
* Manage customers infrastructure issues: Diagnose, resolve, and anticipate technical issues related to the infrastructure.
* Conduct platform health checks: Perform on\-demand audits to assess the performance and resilience of platforms and recommend improvements.
* Ensure technical documentation of the architecture: Write and update architecture\-related documentation, ensuring it is clear and accessible to all stakeholders.
* Collaborate with other teams: Work closely with the Product team to integrate architectural needs into the products, and with Solution Engineers to support pre\-sales efforts in resolving platform issues and addressing design requests.


 🤝 Who You’ll Work With
   

  

 Briefly describe the team environment and collaboration style:
   

  

* The CPA ME will be part of the KSA’s team while reporting to the global manager of the CPA function.
* The CPA works closely and continuously with Customer Success Managers, Solution Engineers, and Engineering teams.


 🧬 Profile We’re Looking For
   

  

* Strong expertise in on\-premise infrastructure (servers, networking, virtualization, storage) and exposure to cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Practical experience with containerization runtimes and orchestration platforms such as docker, podman and kubernetes.
* Solid understanding of kubernetes architecture and helm\-based application deployments.
* Strong problem\-solving skills and the ability to diagnose complex infrastructure issues.
* Background in customer\-facing technical roles.
* Fluent in English.
* Fluent in Arabic.
* Comfortable working in a remote, async\-first environment, with strong autonomy and ownership.
* Bonus: Previous experience in the cybersecurity industry.
* Communication skills to explain complex technical concepts to various audiences (customers, internal teams, both technical and non\-technical individuals, etc.).
* Analytical mindset and the ability to identify effective solutions for infrastructure challenges.
* Ability to integrate the Customer team, with a willingness to learn and understand the products’ features, software architecture, and threat intelligence domain.
* Team player with collaboration skills, capable of working with multidisciplinary teams.


 🌱
 **Why Join Filigran? More than just a job.**
 We’re a fast\-growing, global, and fully remote company building open\-source cybersecurity solutions, increasingly powered by AI, to help defense teams anticipate threats and act faster.
   

  

 ⭐
 **What we believe**
 We believe we do work that matters, uniting defenders into a global community to make security more open, resilient \& collaborative.
   

  

 💻
 **How we work**
 We do work that matters by combining strong engineering standards with emerging technologies, including AI, to move faster and smarter.
   

  

 🧭
 **What guides us**
 We make our work matter by building a culture grounded in our CORE values of Cohesion, Openness, Responsibility, and Equity. The principles that guide how we make decisions, treat people, and grow together, especially when no one’s watching.
   

  

**💰 Compensation \& Benefits**
* Competitive pay \+ equity \- everyone shares in our success
* Remote\-first, flexible, and balanced \- work that fits your life
* Your setup, your choice \- pick the gear that works for you
* Twice\-a\-year gatherings \- we meet in person for regional and global offsites to connect, collaborate, and strengthen our culture beyond the screen


**🌍 Equal Employment Opportunity**
**We enable cybersecurity through inclusion \- from code to culture.**
 At Filigran, we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We believe diversity of our people make our products and our team stronger. We welcome talent of every background, identity, and lived experience, regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or veteran status.
   

  

 What matters here is what you bring, not what you look like, where you’re from, or how you identify.
   

  

**🚀 Ready to Join Us?**
 Apply now and help us build the future of the cybersecurity ecosystem, together.

* Collaborate closely with engineering and design teams to ensure timely delivery and high\-quality execution.
* Communicate product updates, progress, and risks to leadership and key stakeholders.
* Drive continuous improvement through experimentation, A/B testing, performance analytics, and feedback loops.
* Mentor junior product team members and support best practices across the organization.
* Act as the voice of the user, ensuring usability, accessibility, and experience excellence.

* Demonstrated success in launching and scaling digital products.

**Job Purpose:** 
 As the Manager, Product Festival Local Partner Activations, you will contribute to the planning and coordination of all local partner and stakeholder activations for the Esports World Cup (EWC) \& Esports Nations Cup (ENC) festivals. You will act as a key point of contact for local entities \- including sponsors, private partners, tourism organizations, municipalities, and community groups \- ensuring their successful participation within the festival environment.
   

  

 You will contribute to the design, integration, and delivery of partner zones and activations, ensuring alignment with the overall festival master plan, operational standards, and fan experience objectives.
   

  

**Duties And Responsibilities**
* Contribute to the planning, coordination, and execution of all local partner activations within the EWC \& ENC festivals.
* Manage relationships with Saudi\-based sponsors, private companies, and community partners participating in the festival.
* Manage partner onboarding, briefing, and coordination through all stages \- from design and setup to live operations and dismantling along with the Senior Manager
* Ensure all partner activations align with the festival’s creative direction, brand identity, and operational guidelines.
* Collaborate with the internal teams to ensure activations meet layout, permitting, and compliance requirements.
* Co\-Supervise external vendors, contractors, and production agencies responsible for building and delivering activation spaces.
* Manage the festival’s local partner activation schedule, ensuring smooth operations and on\-time delivery.
* Coordinate with the Marketing and Fan Engagement teams to maximize visibility and fan participation in local partner activities.
* Align on reporting frameworks to evaluate partner satisfaction, performance, and ROI after the festival.
* Where directed, monitor budgets, track expenses, and ensure financial alignment across activation projects.
* Prepare partner decks, status updates, and event recaps for senior management and key stakeholders.
* Maintain strong relationships with municipal and community organizations to encourage local engagement and participation.


**Education And Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree in Event Management, Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
* 8\+ years of experience in event management, sponsorship activation, or stakeholder relations within entertainment, sports, or large\-scale public events.


**Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities**
* Proven experience managing brand activations and sponsorship projects from concept to delivery.
* Strong stakeholder management and negotiation skills.
* Excellent understanding of large\-scale event planning and partner integration.
* Experience collaborating with creative, commercial, and operational teams.
* Strong project management and organizational abilities, with attention to detail.
* Ability to manage multiple activations simultaneously under tight timelines.
* Solid budgeting, tracking, and reporting capabilities.
* Strong interpersonal and communication skills; able to represent EWC with professionalism.
* Fluent in English and Arabic (spoken and written).
* Prior professional experience working in KSA.

* Competitive compensation
* Housing allowance
* VIP medical insurance
* Opportunity to work on a new exciting project with a group of passionate professionals. You will get the freedom to excel and make a real impact

We genuinely believe that thanks to creating a collaborative environment where different perspectives are valued, we can achieve more. description:
**About Us**
 With offices in 152 countries and nearly 328,000 professionals, we are one of the world’s leading professional services networks, helping organisations and individuals create lasting value through Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. For over 40 years, we have contributed to the Middle East’s transformation journey, partnering with governments and businesses to deliver sustainable solutions. Today, more than 12,000 of us across Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Libya, Oman, Palestine, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE are shaping the region’s future.
   

  

**Line Of Service Overview**
 Our Middle East Assurance practice includes over 2,300 people based in 12 countries across the region and is part of PwC’s global network that is operating worldwide. PwC Middle East’s Assurance practice combines the right mix of human\-led and tech powered solutions to provide our clients with quality audits and other risk services that create confidence and impact in our region and across society.
   

  

**Business Unit Overview**
 Core Assurance is a cornerstone of our Assurance practice, focused on delivering high\-quality audits that build trust and drive sustained outcomes.
   

  

 Our teams apply deep technical expertise and leverage advanced digital tools to provide independent assurance over financial reporting. Through a human\-led, tech\-powered approach, we help clients meet regulatory requirements, enhance transparency, and strengthen stakeholder confidence, creating impact across industries and society.
   

  

**How You’ll Contribute**
 As an Audit Senior Manager, you will be in charge of an iconic client portfolio and you will be responsible for managing the full cycle of your audit assignments. You’ll work as part of a team of problem solvers, helping to solve complex business issues from strategy to execution. Responsibilities include but are not limited to:
   

  

* Assisting proactively in the management of a portfolio of client, where you will be responsible for the day\-to\-day management client liaison and technical issues management.
* Being responsible for business development activities to help identify and research opportunities on new/existing clients along with building and maintaining strong relationships with clients.
* Developing strategies to solve complex technical challenges and contribute to the development of your own and your team’s technical acumen.
* Assisting in the management and delivering of large projects, ensuring that key deadlines are met.
* Acting in charge of designing the audit strategy and managing the audit execution in allignment with the engagement leader guidance. You will advise clients on financial reporting and regulatory developments, as well as staying up to date with the regulatory changes by attending internal and external seminars.
* Managing client relations with senior management, including delivering presentations to the board of directors and audit committees.
* Ensuring you are adhering to compliance with the risk, quality and independence matters.
* Keeping up to date with local and national business and economic issue.
* Being responsible for the coaching, mentoring and development of team members reporting to you while caring about their well\-being.
* Encouraging involvement in digital initiatives and the use of audit transformation technologies, as well as the use of alternative delivery models, in order to ensure compliance with our firm's vision and ensure a more robust audit.
* Taking part of the recruitment process for interviewing and selecting the most competent candidates as per PwC hiring standards.


**What You’ll Bring**
 You are ambitious and get use of opportunities to grow and develop. In addition, you recognise yourself in the following characteristics:
   

  

* A degree in accounting, finance or other related academic major.
* Minimum of 8\-10 years of professional experience in external financial audit in one of the big 4\.
* Completed a recognised professional qualifications such as ACCA, CA, ACA, CPA.
* Experience in auditing Banking clients is a must.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills that allow you to thrive in a team environment.
* Bilingual proficiency in Arabic and English (oral and written) is a plus.
* Applying the international standards on Auditing (ISAs) on the external audit of financial services with profound IFRS knowledge relevant to the FS practice (such as IFRS9, IFRS17\) and financial services regulations.
* Strong project management skills and experience managing an audit from planning to completion.
* Confidence in challenging yourself and others to complete high quality testing and documentation.
* Ability to establish and nurture positive relationships across all levels \- both internally and externally.
* Driving innovative thinking and supports others through change and uncertainty to overcome hurdles.
* Experience encouraging a team environment that promotes collaboration and constructive challenge and has demonstrated the ability to act quickly to resolve team issues and questions.
* Taking pride in your work and in the Audit profession, showing resilience and demonstrating dedication to self\-development including being agile and innovative in the digital world.
* Promoting and encouraging others to value difference when working in diverse teams.
* Knowledge in any Audit technologies, and experience using Data Analytics tools.


**How You’ll Make a Difference**
 At PwC Midde East, we expect all our people to embody the skills and behaviours of The PwC Professional framework, helping us deliver on our strategy while growing and developing as leaders at every level.
   

  

**Why You’ll Love Working at PwC**
 At PwC Middle East, you’ll find more than just a job \- you’ll build a meaningful career, supported by rewards and benefits that help you thrive. We offer competitive pay, comprehensive benefits, and programs that promote well\-being, balance, and personal growth. You’ll have access to continuous learning, digital upskilling, and a collaborative environment that values innovation, mentorship, and diversity. Are you ready to make a difference? Want to unlock new value by applying your unique perspective and talents? You can grow exponentially here. Discover more about Life at PwC Middle East.

You will be responsible for executing the product strategy that drives key business metrics across the user lifecycle (Acquisition, Activation, Retention, and Revenue). * Comprehensive Health Insurance
* Rewards and recognition
* Learning \& Development



 \#KSABayut

description:
About the Role:
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 The
 **Senior Account Manager** 
 is responsible for the day\-to\-day on the ground project coordination to help deliver a long\-term large scale digital project.
   

  

 This role will be embedded with the client team and act as a primary on\-the\-ground point of coordination in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The Senior Account Manager will work closely with our client’s internal departments and teams to gather feedback to communicate with the rest of the Journey team. The Senior Account Manager is responsible for delivering large and small scale projects according to brief, timeline and budget alongside developing strong relationships with the client team.
   

  

 Due to the nature of the work, the ideal candidate has experience supporting capital projects within cultural institutions and understands how creative work integrates into longer construction and institutional timelines.
   

  

**The Project**
 This giga\-project is a landmark destination city built around the philosophy of the “Power of Play,” integrating entertainment, sports, and culture at unprecedented scale within a livable urban environment. Spanning a wide range of districts and planned to support 500,000 residents, it brings together world\-class attractions, major global events, and diversified leisure offerings while contributing to broader national transformation ambitions.
   

  

 This Next\-Gen Visualisation programme supports this vision by establishing a scalable digital production ecosystem—including a continuously updatable Unreal Engine “Marketing Twin”—that enables consistent, high\-quality storytelling across multiple stakeholders. This platform integrates asset governance, real\-time workflows, and creative guidelines to ensure the digital representation of the city evolves in parallel with its physical development and can be used reliably by internal and external partners.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**

description:
Barco Control Rooms business unit is making workflow and visualization solutions for the Control Room market since 1994 to help operators collect, visualize and share critical information for optimal mission\-critical decision making. Today, we are still the number one choice for control room professionals who want to stay on top of their situational awareness with 12000\+ installations for critical infrastructure and critical operations.
   

  

 Barco CTRL is our latest flagship software product. It is a simple, scalable and secure platform, that gives an operator full control over the information flow in an easy and intuitive way for faster and efficient decision making.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As we expand KVM solution business in Saudi Arabia we are looking for a Business Development Manager who will be responsible for:
   

  

* Market Development: Open doors to new end\-user accounts within SAR region.


**Relationship Building** 
 : Leverage industry contacts and networks to penetrate the market.
   

  

* Sales Activities:
+ Conduct product presentations and demos.
+ Highlight unique selling propositions of Barco’s KVM solutions.


**Strategic Contribution** 
 : Support Barco’s transition from large video wall solutions to operator\-focused KVM solutions.
   

  

* Project\-Based Selling:
+ Focus on integrated solutions rather than off\-the\-shelf products.
+ Understand AV/IT integration for complex projects.


**What are we looking for?**
* Minimum 5 years of sales experience in KVM industry ( keyboard, video, Mouse).
* Strong technical sales background.
* Sales Experience in Saudi Arabia
* Hunting mindset to grow the end customer base
* Ability to engage with end users

**WHAT MAKES US A GREAT PLACE TO WORK**





 We are proud to be consistently recognized as one of the world’s best places to work. We are currently the top ranked consulting firm on Glassdoor’s Best Places to Work list and have earned the \#1 overall spot a record seven times. Extraordinary teams are at the heart of our business strategy, but these don’t happen by chance. They require intentional focus on bringing together a broad set of backgrounds, cultures, experiences, perspectives, and skills in a supportive and inclusive work environment. We hire people with exceptional talent and create an environment in which every individual can thrive professionally and personally.
 








  




***APPLICATION DEADLINE APRIL 12***









  




**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH**
 You’ll join our
 **Product Management \& Innovation** 
 experts within the
 **AI, Insights \& Solutions (AIS)** 
 team. This group includes specialists in analytics, engineering, product management, user research, and design. Together, we create human\-centric solutions that harness the power of data and artificial intelligence to drive competitive advantage for our clients.
 








  




**WHERE YOU’LL FIT WITHIN THE TEAM** 






 As an Expert Manager, Product Management \& Innovation, you’ll work on integrated teams alongside our general consultants and clients to lead development of omnichannel solutions across a wide range of industries and problems—driving the strategic vision with cross\-functional teams to deliver impactful, feasible, and client\-aligned experiences, products, and businesses. You’ll advise on innovation and product strategy and are expected to independently lead parts of the work, including defining the workplan, fostering cross\-collaboration, managing direct and cross\-functional reports, engaging with clients, and overseeing answer/product definition and delivery.
 





 You have a passion for designing and developing customer\-centric innovative solutions, a foundation in product development, technical aptitude, and a collaborative mindset. With a special focus on driving innovation, you will work closely with engineering, design, and strategy teams to explore emerging technologies, validate new ideas, and guide agile development from research and planning to execution. You'll contribute to high\-impact, client\-facing solutions while building your technical and strategic skills in a fast\-paced, experimentation \& data\-driven environment.
 








  




**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 




* Apply Human\-Centered Design to Product Strategy and Innovation




 Integrate human\-centered design into product strategy, aligning research with business and customer goals, turning insights into product vision. Guide ideation sessions, journey mapping, and service design workshops to align teams around user\-centric solutions. Lead collaboration with design and research teams to support prototyping and testing to ensure continuous validation while applying a strategic lens to balance user needs, reliable tech solutions, business needs, and alignment.
 



* **Support the Strategy Setting and Delivery of  Proof of Concepts (POCs) and Minimum Viable Products (MVPs), and Products**




 Partner closely with Bain teams and clients to understand business challenges, deliver on business needs, and drive results. Apply agile and product management best practices to drive excellence—from agile ceremonies to managing risks and optimizing roadmaps. Recommend solutions that are grounded in insights and lead to measurable outcomes for users and the business.
 



* **Support Product Planning, Roadmap Definition, and Execution**




 Apply your deep expertise to generate insights across user needs, reliable tech solutions, business needs, and strategic alignment. Support the development and evolution of product roadmaps, ensuring initiatives align with broader strategic goals. Guide decision\-making and effectively translate complex technical concepts into clear and non\-technical language for all stakeholders. Leverage business and user insights to define, size, and prioritize product roadmap opportunities, articulating associated tradeoffs and mitigating risks throughout the product lifecycle. Maintain a curious and proactive mindset, adopting emerging tools and technologies, such as generative AI, to boost productivity and enhance team outcomes.
 



* **Contribute to Building an Inspired Team**




 Play an active role and lead in creating a collaborative case team culture across AIS, clients, and other stakeholders. Quickly integrate into client environments, building trust and influence through strong collaboration and consistent engagement. Create alignment across stakeholders through transparency, shared ownership, and momentum toward results.
 



* **Support Building Capabilities and Skills of AIS, Bain and Client Teams**




 Mentor junior team members and continue building your skills in human\-centered design, agile, technical fluency (e.g., how products are built and scaled), and innovation\-driven product management. Contribute to internal initiatives and intellectual property in Product Management and Innovation. Explore and adopt emerging tools and technologies—like generative AI—to enhance productivity, innovation, and team delivery. Capture and share learnings from client work to strengthen institutional knowledge within AIS and Bain communities.
 



* **Travel expectation: 40–50%**











**ABOUT YOU** 






**Required Qualifications** 




* Relevant Bachelor’s degree
* 7 years minimum experience
* Proficiency in the four lenses (feasibility, viability, desirability, strategy) with the ability to manage two\-three lenses simultaneously
* Proficient in product managing software development with hands\-on experience in AI solutions and deployment in production environments
* Experience using Gen\-AI powered product development tools effectively (i.e Synthetic Users, VoiceOver, Loveable, etc.)
* Foundational knowledge of agentic AI architectures, including common use cases and end\-to\-end workflows (e.g., orchestration, tool use, and evaluation).
* Experience in design thinking principles and leading or facilitating workshops to cultivate design thinking innovation process
* Able to explain the technical aspects of the products worked on
* Ability to rapidly absorb and interpret technical information, with a deep understanding of modern design and development principles
* Experience in applying agile and scrum methodologies to lead cross\-functional teams
* Experience in Lean Startup methodology and applying its principles
* Strong interpersonal and communication skills, including the ability to explain and discuss approaches and technicalities of solutions with colleagues and clients from other disciplines
* Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and collaborate effectively in complex, ambiguous situations, including ability to explain and discuss approaches and technicalities of solutions with colleagues and clients from other disciplines
* Curiosity, proactivity and critical thinking
* Ability to collaborate with people at all levels and with multi\-office/region teams
* Ability to manage cross\-functional/inter\-disciplinary teams including engineers, designers and researchers
* Fluency in English and Arabic is required.











**Preferred Qualifications** 




* Relevant Master’s degree in business or technology or related field
* Commercial acumen and understanding of business models
* Experience working in startups or other entrepreneurial environments
* Top\-tier consulting experience preferred
* Background in architecture/software dev/data pipelines
* Experience in product managing the architecting and implementing of AI/tech solutions at an enterprise scale
* Solid product management experience, with a history of managing the development and launch of analytics or ML\-driven software, solutions, or services
* Experience in product managing the building and deploying ML pipelines into production

description:
**About Lucidya**
 Lucidya is a leading AI\-powered Customer Experience Management (CXM) platform that enables brands to listen, understand, and engage with their customers across multiple channels. As part of our ambitious growth and innovation roadmap, we are launching a new AI Agent platform designed to automate and elevate customer interactions through cutting\-edge artificial intelligence.
   

  

 This is a strategic, ground\-floor opportunity to join a small, dedicated team at the forefront of an emerging market. You won't just manage tasks \- you will shape the product's vision, strategy, and execution, leaving a tangible mark on a transformative platform.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 As the Senior Product Manager for the AI Agent platform, you will own the entire product lifecycle \- from defining and refining the roadmap to driving discovery with clients, collaborating closely with engineering and design teams, and delivering high\-impact features that meet evolving market and customer needs.
   

  

 You will be the key driver ensuring that our AI Agent delivers exceptional customer experience every day, continuously improving based on data, feedback, and market trends.
   

  

**Your Team \& Collaboration**
 You will lead a high\-performing, cross\-functional team that includes:
   

  

* 2 Front\-end Engineers
* 2 Backend Engineers
* 3 AI Engineers
* 1 Senior Product Designer
* 1 Software Quality Assurance Specialist
* Solution Consultant


 Your collaboration extends across Lucidya's broader product teams (Social Listening, Engage), Sales and Customer Success teams, clients for discovery and validation, external integration partners, and AI leadership (Director of AI, AI Agent Engineering Manager).
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own and drive the product roadmap for the AI Agent platform, aligning priorities with business goals and client needs
* Lead continuous discovery efforts with customers and internal stakeholders to validate and refine product direction
* Define product scope, releases, and success metrics; monitor agent performance post\-launch
* Translate client feedback into actionable product improvements and feature enhancements
* Collaborate with AI engineers to define agent use cases and capabilities
* Identify and prioritize integrations with third\-party platforms and Lucidya modules based on business value
* Stay abreast of AI Agent industry trends and emerging technologies, evaluating their potential impact on our product
* Test and vet new tools and technologies to drive innovation and efficiency


**Day\-to\-Day Activities**
* Conduct regular sync meetings with engineering and design teams for alignment on scope, priorities, and delivery timelines
* Prioritize and manage the product backlog in support of roadmap execution
* Engage in client discovery sessions and calls to gather insights and validate product decisions
* Write and refine detailed product specifications and user stories
* Review designs and provide constructive feedback to ensure usability and alignment
* Track and analyze product KPIs and agent performance data
* Coordinate with cross\-functional stakeholders to ensure seamless product delivery


**What Success Looks Like**
* Rapidly shape and execute a clear product vision and roadmap that resonates with client needs and market opportunities
* Establish robust discovery and feedback loops that consistently improve product\-market fit
* Deliver scalable AI Agent features and integrations that drive customer satisfaction and business growth
* Foster strong collaboration and communication across technical and non\-technical teams
* Demonstrate agility in navigating an evolving AI landscape and fast\-moving market dynamics


**Challenges You'll Overcome**
* Navigating the fast\-evolving AI Agent market by continuously monitoring trends and making strategic decisions
* Extracting true client pain points when customer understanding of AI capabilities may be limited
* Quickly ramping up on technical and AI concepts to effectively partner with engineers and AI experts


**Requirements**
 Experience:
   

  

* 5\+ years as a Product Manager in B2B SaaS environments
* Experience with AI\-powered products is a strong plus (focus on building AI\-enabled features, not AI model development)


 Skills \& Qualifications:
   

  

* Native Arabic speaker with professional proficiency in English
* Exceptional discovery skills to extract actionable insights from client feedback
* Strong prioritization and decision\-making abilities, balancing trade\-offs effectively
* Comfortable working closely with engineering teams and understanding technical concepts
* Excellent communication skills for diverse stakeholder engagement
* Creative and logical thinker with a hands\-on mindset \- willing to explore new tools and technologies
* Adaptable to ambiguity in a fast\-paced, evolving product environment
* Market\-aware: continuously researches AI, CXM, and competitive trends


**Interview Process**
* MawHub Screening
* Technical Interview with Kassem Bagher (AI Agent Engineering Manager) \& Hasan Al\-Hendi (Head of Product)
* Final Interview with Tarik Shalby (General Manager \- AI Agent) \& Qaiser Khan (Director of AI)


 If you're passionate about AI, customer experience, and building products that redefine how brands engage with customers, we want to hear from you. Join us and help shape the future of AI\-driven customer interactions.

description:
Sanabil Studio is a venture builder that blends industry expertise, technology, and startup know\-how to turn bold ideas into real businesses. We take concepts from zero to launch, and when a venture proves its potential, we back it with seed funding and hands\-on support to help it scale.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead product execution across multiple ventures, operating at the intersection of design, engineering, and business to bring ideas from zero to one through rapid experimentation, iterative MVPs, and user\-centric thinking.
   

  

**THE ROLE** 
 What you'll own here.
   

  

* Collaborate with studio leadership to shape product direction and ensure alignment with venture theses.
* Lead structured discovery sprints, user interviews, and competitive analysis to validate product\-market fit.
* Translate insights into actionable roadmaps and MVP definitions that balance speed, scalability, and user value.
* Own the end\-to\-end product development process — from PRDs and wireframes through to launch.
* Write clear product requirements and collaborate closely with designers and engineers to execute quickly and iteratively.
* Work with engineering teams on trade\-offs, architectural decisions, and product feasibility.
* Use product analytics, user feedback, and behavioral data to drive continuous improvement.
* Evaluate and integrate third\-party APIs, SaaS tools, and low\-code solutions to accelerate development.
* Create reusable product playbooks, tools, and templates to streamline builds across ventures.
* Mentor junior product team members on best practices, agile methodologies, and lean experimentation.
* Maintain visibility across ventures to ensure consistency, quality, and alignment with studio goals.


**What you’ll work with:** 
 Figma, Amplitude, Mixpanel, Jira/Linear, Notion, Miro.
   

  

**THE PROFILE** 
 You're probably a fit if…
   

  

* You have 5–8 years of product management experience in early\-stage startups, venture studios, or high\-growth environments.
* You have built and launched MVPs from scratch, not just managed roadmaps for existing products.
* You are technically fluent enough to collaborate with engineers on system architecture, APIs, data models, and trade\-offs.
* You can create clarity and momentum in ambiguous, zero\-to\-one environments without needing detailed direction.
* You have strong user empathy, product intuition, and disciplined prioritization skills.
* You can manage multiple ventures at different stages without losing focus or execution quality.
* You are fluent in both Arabic and English.


**Bonus:** 
 Experience in fintech, SaaS, AI, or consumer technology products.
   

  

**THE ENVIRONMENT:** 
 What working here actually looks like.
   

  

* Multi\-Venture Scope: You will work across multiple ventures simultaneously, each at a different stage; no two weeks or challenges are the same.
* Shape Product Culture: This is not just an execution role. You will help define how the product is built at Sanabil Studio — creating playbooks, mentoring talent, and raising the bar across ventures.
* Close to the Build: You will work directly with founders, venture architects, designers, and engineers — at the center of decision\-making, not downstream of it.


**What You Get From Us**
* Competitive pay: A package that reflects your experience and the market.
* Premium gear, day one: Apple laptop and phone, fully set up before your first day.
* Mentorship that matters: Learn from people who have built and scaled ventures.
* Global mobility: Opportunities to work across international markets and teams.
* Venture upside: The chance to join spin\-off teams as they grow and be recognized for your contribution.
* An accelerated curve: You’ll learn more here in 12 months than most roles offer in three years.
required_skills: agile, ai, api, arabic, english, leadership, product management

description:
****Why qlub****
 Qlub is revolutionizing the dining experience with ultra fast, seamless payment solutions. Guests pay in seconds by scanning a QR code with no app download required.
   

  

 From Pay\-at\-Table QR payments and Digital Menus to Order\-and\-Pay, Payment Links, and SoftPOS terminals,
 **qlub streamlines the entire payment process, making it faster and more convenient for both diners and restaurants** 
 . Even splitting the bill becomes effortless.
   

  

 We help restaurants focus on what they do best, delivering great hospitality. By removing payment friction, we increase table turnover, improve operational efficiency, and boost profitability. Built\-in analytics, instant tipping and reviews, and automated accounting empower restaurants to succeed in today's digital\-first world.
   

  

 We are a fast scaling fintech startup
 **backed by Mubadala, e\&, Shorooq and Mastercard** 
 . With
 **$72M total fundraised** 
 , we have
 **expanded globally** 
 ,
 **doubled headcount** 
 over the past year, and this is just the beginning!
   

  

 This is more than a job. It is an opportunity to help shape how qlub scales as we build high performing, diverse teams around the world.
   

  

****The role****
 We’re looking for a hands\-on, entrepreneurial Product Manager to own and grow key products in a specific market. This role is ideal for someone who wants to operate as a: Product Manager × Growth Hacker × Entrepreneur
   

  

 This is not a traditional product management role focused on writing long PRDs, running sprints, or acting as a coordinator between stakeholders and engineering. Instead, this role focuses on the often\-forgotten side of product management: deeply understanding customers, discovering opportunities, shaping monetization, and driving real product growth. You will operate more like a mini\-founder inside the company—someone who constantly explores the market, interacts with users, discovers opportunities, and works with the engineering teams to turn them into successful products.
   

  

 If you enjoy talking to customers more than writing documents, testing ideas in the real world, and figuring out how products grow, this role is likely for you.
   

  

**What you’ll be driving:**
**Deep Customer Understanding \& Market Discovery**
* Conducting customer interviews, surveys, and field research
* Studying customer journeys to identify pain points and friction
* Discovering unmet needs and opportunity gaps
* Building and engaging a community of early adopters and beta testers
* Actively engaging with users to collect feedback and test ideas
* Studying market dynamics and cultural factors that influence customer behavior
* Analyzing competitors through the lens of customer experience
* Why customers choose them
* What customers love or dislike about their products
* How competitors create or destroy customer value
* Translating customer insights into new product opportunities


**Monetization \& Commercial Strategy**
* Designing and testing monetization models
* Exploring pricing strategies and revenue opportunities
* Connecting product decisions to business outcomes
* Identifying commercial opportunities within product usage and customer behavior


**Product Growth \& Adoption**
* Drive user adoption and engagement
* Identify and remove growth friction points
* Run experiments to improve activation, conversion, and retention
* Work closely with engineering, design, operations, and marketing teams to unlock growth
* Apply a growth\-hacking mindset to continuously improve product performance


**Data\-Driven Product Thinking**
* Analyzing user and product data to uncover insights
* Identifying trends and behavioral patterns
* Validating ideas and experiments with data
* Supporting growth initiatives through analysis and experimentation


**Qualifications**
* \~2 years of product management or startup experience
* Founder or startup\-building experience is highly valued (success or failure doesn’t matter)
* Experience building, launching, or monetizing products is a strong plus
* You behave like a problem solver and opportunity hunter, not a process manager. You think like a mini\-founder, constantly looking for ways to improve the product and grow the business.
* You like building and testing things yourself. You’re comfortable experimenting with tools and finding creative ways to move ideas forward.
* You naturally use modern tools and AI to accelerate your work and solve problems efficiently.
* You are passionate about learning new things and can quickly acquire skills in areas you don’t yet know.
* You genuinely enjoy talking to users, understanding their lives, and building relationships with them. Engaging with customers and communities should feel natural and energizing.


****What we offer****
* Strong entrepreneurial spirit \- you want to build something big and have a measurable impact for your efforts.
* You are self\-motivated and have a result\-oriented mindset, you hustle to get things done and proactively find ways to reach and over achieve your targets.
* Be part of an exciting, fast\-paced environment, where you can grow the business from an early\-stage start\-up into a global organization.
* Drive growth and tailoring of fast\-evolving new products and features
* Work with highly motivated people, enthusiastic about improving the customer experience at table\-service restaurants.


 Sounds like you? Are you excited by this opportunity? If so,
 **“Apply now”** 
 .

description:
**Who Are We?**
 We Are Foodics, a leading restaurant management ecosystem and payment technology provider. Since our founding in 2014, with headquarters in Riyadh and offices in 5 countries (UAE, Egypt, Jordan, and Kuwait), we've been serving customers and partners across 35\+ countries worldwide. To date, our innovative solutions have successfully processed over 6 billion orders, making us one of the fastest\-evolving SaaS companies in the MENA region.
   

  

 Our mission? To revolutionize the Food \& Beverage (F\&B) industry through innovative technology that enhances customer experiences, optimizes operations, and drives growth.
   

  

**The Job in a Nutshell 💡**
 We are looking for a Product Manager \- Accounting to lead the development and expansion of Foodics Accounting, a core financial product within the Foodics Financial Services ecosystem.
   

  

 This product will enable restaurant operators to manage their accounting, financial reporting, tax compliance, and reconciliation directly within the Foodics platform, eliminating the need for external accounting tools.
   

  

 The role focuses on building a regionally compliant, automation\-first accounting platform that seamlessly integrates with Foodics POS, Payments, and Financial Services products.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
* Define and execute the product strategy for Foodics Accounting across the Middle East and Egypt
* Build an accounting platform deeply integrated with the Foodics Financial Services ecosystem
* Ensure the product supports end\-to\-end financial workflows for restaurants, from transaction capture to financial reporting
* Design accounting workflows compliant with regional tax authorities, including ZATCA (Saudi Arabia), UAE VAT regulations, Egyptian Tax Authority and other regional compliance frameworks
* Ensure the system supports VAT, e\-invoicing, and regulatory reporting requirements across markets
* Develop automation rules for bookkeeping and reconciliation to minimize manual accounting tasks
* Enable automated categorization of transactions from POS, payments, and expenses
* Design smart accounting workflows tailored for restaurant operations
* Ensure seamless integration with Foodics POS, Foodics Payments, Inventory \& purchasing, Payroll and expenses and banking integrations
* Build APIs and integrations with external financial systems where necessary
* Translate product vision into roadmaps, PRDs, and execution plans
* Work closely with engineering, design, compliance, and financial experts
* Prioritize features based on customer value, regulatory requirements, and scalability
* Conduct market research on regional accounting solutions and regulatory environments
* Gather feedback from accountants, restaurant operators, and finance teams
* Identify opportunities to simplify financial workflows for SMEs and enterprise restaurant groups


 To conclude, you'll build a
 **regionally compliant accounting platform for restaurant businesses that integrates operations, payments, and POS data to automate bookkeeping and provide a financial system tailored for hospitality operators in the Middle East.**
**What We're Looking For❓**
* 5\+ years experience in Product Management, preferably in Fintech, Accounting, ERP, or Financial SaaS
* Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting
* Experience building products with tax compliance or regulatory frameworks
* Ability to work with complex financial workflows and automation systems
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Experience working with cross\-functional teams including engineering, compliance, and finance


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* Experience with accounting platforms (QuickBooks, Xero, Zoho Books, Odoo, etc.)
* Knowledge of VAT, e\-invoicing, and tax regulations in the Middle East
* Experience building products for hospitality or retail industries
* Background in Fintech or embedded finance products


**What We Offer You❗**
 We believe you will love working at Foodics!
   

  

* We have an inclusive and diverse culture that encourages innovation and flexibility in\-office, and hybrid work setups
* We offer highly competitive compensation packages, including bonuses and the potential for shares
* We prioritize personal development and offer regular training and an annual learning stipend to tackle new challenges and grow your career in a hyper\-growth environment
* Join a talented team of over 30 nationalities working in 14 countries, and gain valuable experience in an exciting industry
* We offer autonomy, mentoring, and challenging goals that create incredible opportunities for both you and the company

job_title: Senior Manager - HSE Fire & Safety - MBS Stadium - SPA 375
description:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a Senior Manager \- Fire \& Safety for the MBS Stadium project, this role is responsible for the development, planning, review, assurance, and monitoring of the Project Fire Strategy and Fire Safety Management Plan throughout the construction phase of the MBS Stadium Project.
   

  

 The role provides independent professional fire engineering and fire safety leadership, ensuring that construction activities, temporary works, sequencing, and interfaces do not compromise life safety, asset protection, or regulatory compliance, while supporting project delivery objectives.
   

  

 The role operates across both Delivery and Safety functions, acting as a critical technical authority, integrator, and assurance role.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Fire Strategy \& Planning:
* Develop, maintain, and govern the Construction Phase Fire Strategy, aligned with: Approved design intent
* Phased handovers and partial occupations
* Temporary works and evolving site conditions
* Produce and maintain the Project Fire Safety Management Plan (FSMP) for construction activities
* Ensure the fire strategy remains live, dynamic, and construction\-stage appropriate, including transitional states
* Design Review \& Assurance:
* Review and assure fire and life safety elements of:
* Construction drawings and shop drawings
* Method statements and construction sequencing
* Temporary works designs impacting fire risk
* Ensure design changes, value engineering, and site deviations do not undermine the approved fire strategy
* Provide fire safety input to change management and technical queries (RFIs, NCRs, concessions)
* Construction Monitoring \& Compliance:
* Monitor implementation of fire safety controls on site, including:
* Means of escape (temporary and permanent)
* Fire compartmentation integrity
* Fire stopping and penetration management
* Temporary fire protection measures
* Verify compliance with approved plans, permits, and procedures through inspections, audits, and site walks
* Track, report, and close fire safety observations and non\-conformances
* Interface with Delivery Teams:
* Act as a trusted advisor to Construction, Package, and Interface Managers
* Support safe sequencing and staging of works while maintaining programme momentum
* Proactively identify conflicts between construction activities and fire safety requirements and provide practical solutions
* Contractor \& Supply Chain Oversight:
* Ensure the review and approve contractor fire safety submissions, including: Construction Fire Plans
* Emergency Response Plans
* Hot works and high\-risk activity controls
* Ensure contractors implement competent fire safety supervision and site arrangements
* Lead fire safety workshops, briefings, and coordination meetings with contractors
* Emergency Preparedness \& Incident Readiness:
* Develop and oversee site\-wide construction emergency response arrangements for fire scenarios
* Coordinate fire drills, exercises, and readiness assessments
* Liaise with local emergency services as required
* Regulatory \& Authority Interface:
* Ensure compliance with Saudi Civil Defense (SCD) requirements
* Local authority regulations
* Applicable international codes and standards
* QIC minimum standards
* Support inspections, approvals, and authority engagements related to fire safety during construction
* Reporting \& Governance:
* Provide clear, structured reporting on fire safety performance, risks, and trends
* Escalate material fire safety risks through programme governance channels
* Contribute to programme risk registers, assurance reviews, and leadership briefings
* Leadership \& Capability Building:
* Provide mentorship and technical guidance to safety and delivery teams
* Promote a strong fire safety culture across the programme
* Support competency development and awareness across the workforce
* Key Deliverables
* Construction Phase Fire Strategy
* Fire Safety Management Plan (FSMP)
* Fire Risk Assessments
* Fire safety inspection and audit reports
* Contractor fire safety approvals and reviews
* Emergency response and drill records
* Fire safety assurance reports to programme leadership
* Shared lessons from industry experience and investigations


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Fire Engineering, Fire Safety, Engineering, or related field
* A minimum of 12 years' relevant experience in fire and safety management, and fire engineering
* Extensive knowledge of fire safety codes, familiarity with Saudi Civil Defense approval processes standards
* Relevant certifications such as NEBOSH, CFPA, or equivalent are highly desirable
* Strong stakeholder and interface management
* Ability to balance life safety and delivery pressures
required_skills: leadership

This role is responsible for building and scaling high\-performing engineering teams in backend, frontend, mobile, and quality assurance, while ensuring all engineering practices meet the stringent requirements of financial services regulations and SiFi's commitment to product excellence.**
**The Engineering Director will partner closely with the Infrastructure Manager to create a unified technology organization that delivers reliable, secure, and cost\-effective solutions. They must establish robust engineering processes, implement comprehensive quality assurance frameworks, and ensure all development teams can deliver features that meet SAMA regulatory standards and customer expectations.**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead technical architecture strategy and engineering standards across backend, frontend, mobile, and QA disciplines.
* Build, develop, and scale high\-performing engineering teams with clear career progression paths and performance expectations.
* Establish and enforce engineering best practices including secure coding standards, testing frameworks, and deployment processes that meet financial services requirements.
* Partner with Product teams to translate business requirements into robust technical solutions that drive customer value and business growth.
* Collaborate with the Infrastructure Manager to ensure seamless integration between development and operations, implementing effective DevOps and SRE practices.
* Ensure all engineering deliverables comply with SAMA regulations and financial services security standards through secure development lifecycle practices.
* Drive technical innovation while maintaining focus on system reliability, performance, and maintainability of financial platforms.
* Oversee comprehensive QA strategies including automated testing, performance testing, and security testing to ensure product quality.
* Manage technology vendor relationships, development tools, and engineering infrastructure costs to optimize ROI and operational efficiency.
* Implement engineering metrics and KPIs to drive data\-driven decision making and continuous improvement across all development teams.
* Serve as technical escalation point for complex engineering challenges and ensure timely resolution of production issues.
* Uphold and actively champion SiFi's values:
+ Customer Centricity (building solutions that truly serve customer needs and reduce friction).
+ Product\-First Mindset (engineering excellence that enables fewer features done right, with laser focus on business impact).
+ Data\-Driven Execution (implementing observability and metrics to guide technical decisions and performance optimization).
+ Continuous Innovation (leveraging automation and modern development practices to accelerate delivery).
+ Open Communication \& Collaboration (fostering transparent cross\-functional teamwork between engineering, product, and operations).
+ High Pace, High Standards (delivering features rapidly while maintaining the precision and reliability required in fintech operations).


**Qualifications \& Skills**
* 12\+ years of engineering experience with at least 5 years in senior leadership roles building and scaling engineering teams (15\+ engineers).
* Proven experience in fintech, financial services, or payment systems (mandatory requirement).
* Strong technical background in C\#/.NET and Python development (highly preferred).
* Demonstrated expertise in microservices architecture, cloud\-native development, and distributed systems design.
* Experience with mobile application development (iOS/Android), modern frontend frameworks, and comprehensive QA processes.
* Deep understanding of regulatory compliance requirements including SAMA, PCI DSS, and financial services security frameworks.
* Proven track record managing technology budgets, vendor relationships, and engineering infrastructure investments.
* Strong knowledge of DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, cloud platforms, and infrastructure as code.
* Experience working with financial services regulators and implementing secure development practices for compliance audits.


**Personal Attributes**
* Technical leader with proven ability to transition complex business requirements into scalable engineering solutions.
* Customer\-focused with deep understanding of how engineering decisions impact user experience and business outcomes.
* Data\-driven approach to engineering management, using metrics and analytics to guide team performance and technical decisions.
* Collaborative and transparent communicator who can influence and align cross\-functional teams at all organizational levels.
* Committed to building inclusive, high\-performing teams while maintaining the high pace and high standards required in fintech.
* Resilient and adaptable leader who thrives in fast\-scaling environments and can balance innovation with regulatory compliance.
* Mentoring\-oriented manager who develops engineering talent and fosters a culture of continuous learning and improvement.
* Comfortable operating in ambiguous situations with changing priorities, able to pivot quickly while maintaining team focus and morale.

description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200\+ colleagues in 75\+ countries and very few office based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder led, profitable and growing.
   

  

 Canonical's product management team are technologists who have a passion for delivering products and solutions that help shape market demands while elevating open source software everywhere. This is an application track for a product management position at Canonical on Cloud Native. Apply here if you excel at leadership, communication, and technical vision, and believe you can drive product strategy for the business needs of tomorrow.
   

  

 We believe that open source is transforming the way that enterprises solve their business needs. Although open source has been around for thirty years, it is only now fundamental to every corner of the software landscape. Going forward we believe open source will have an even bigger impact as it moves into specialised vertical markets. Our goal is to make open source easier, more reliable and more secure for deployment and development. We strive to be the provider of 'most software to most companies', starting with Ubuntu but expanding to cover every class of application on every class of compute. To deliver on that ambition, we select product managers for their intellect and strong drive to advance the open source community. Together, we aim to improve open source quality, outreach, and impact. Our product managers set the vision and the direction to ensure teams deliver the right products in the right markets at the right time. They push the boundaries of the technology landscape to identify and deliver products into new and existing market opportunities.
   

  

 Juju is an open source orchestration engine for software operators that enables the deployment, integration and lifecycle management of applications at any scale, on any infrastructure using charms. Juju is currently used by our clients, partners, and the community to orchestrate both small and enterprise\-scale infrastructure and application deployments across a variety of substrates.
   

  

 This role is responsible for the commercial strategy and marketing leadership of one of our cloud native operations product areas, including
   

  

* Juju \- the open source orchestration engine for software operators that enables the deployment, integration and lifecycle management of applications at any scale, on any infrastructure using charms
* Identity management \- defining the way authentication, authorisation and identity governance controls are applied across Ubuntu One SSO and the other Canonical products
* Observability \- outlining the strategy for the way Canonical products and charms perform tracing and are able to discern the underlying system health


 Location: This role will be based remotely in the EMEA region. You will be expected to be based in this region.
   

  

 This role entails
   

  

* Lead the lifecycle of the product development by reviewing the priorities and goals for the products you are responsible for.
* Work closely with the engineering leads to oversee the product development process
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams such as engineering, design, marketing, and sales, to address common challenges across projects, to align on priorities, to make informed decisions, and to keep business execution on track
* Conduct market research, analyse industry trends, and gather customer feedback to identify opportunities, and to ensure alignment with Canonical's overall vision
* Develop your team through coaching, mentoring and training
* Establish KPIs for project status reporting and communicate it across Canonical
* Drive execution excellence through continuous feedback and improvement
* Contribute to the development of strategies to create and maintain high performing teams
* Contribute to the success of our sales team in winning new opportunities, by reviewing customer feedback and participating in customer meetings


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* Seasoned product management experience in technical domains related to the usage and/or the management of open source software in the cloud native landscape
* Experiences designing or managing software operations for large scale distributed systems
* Good understanding of cloud native technologies such as Kubernetes, Docker containers.
* Comprehensive knowledge of the common enterprise security and compliance requirements in the area of software operations
* Proven ability to lead technical teams and drive their execution to excellence
* Passion to write about technologies and experience in the area of developer marketing
* A strong work ethic, and personal interests aligned with the open source philosophy
* Excellent communications skills in English, both verbal and written
* Willingness to travel up to 4 times a year for internal events


 Nice\-to\-have skills
   

  

* Experience with CNCF projects, identity or observability systems is a plus.
* Demonstrate an insatiable intellectual curiosity, and be passionate about the future of technology
* Have a strong sense of ownership. All parts of the product's success and your team's success are your responsibility.
* Be a problem solver, have the ability to think out of the box, and demonstrate visionary leadership


 What we offer you
   

  

 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognise outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance\-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice\-yearly team sprints in person \- we've been working remotely since 2004!
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues from your team and others
* Priority Pass for travel and travel upgrades for long haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence \- in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since its inception in 2004\. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

**Canonical is an equal opportunity employer**
 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.
